title: GENERAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: CHARNELTON COMMUNITY CLINIC GENERAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patient centered health care for children and adults of all ages. Services include: annual exams (including gynecological exams), care for acute and chronic conditions, pregnancy testing, immunizations, sports physicals, mental health evaluation, and health screenings. Assists in the enrollment of OHP and private insurance via the Federal Health Exchange. Also offers a prescription assistance program for established patients. 151 W 7th Avenue Suite 100 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 682-3550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3550 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. No one is turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: LTD bus routes 41 and 51 Services: Childhood Immunization General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Pap Tests Pediatrics Public Clinics Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHARNELTON COMMUNITY CLINIC
